chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 611 of 2024 SCRA 612 of 2024 SCRA 613 of 2024 SCRA 614 of 2024 SCRA 615 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2255/2025. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For hearing of CMA No.2843/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For hearing of CMA No.2844/2024. 20.10.2025 Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, advocate for the applicant. 1. Urgency granted. 2to5. Under instructions, learned counsel does not press these reference applications, which are hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
